rows.label: tev041401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Nemard about life
on the Ma-non ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Nemard if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Nemard about BLADE.

rows.label: tev041401_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Nemard about recent developments.

rows.label: tev041401_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Nemard about recent developments.

rows.label: tev041401_SEL3011
rows.name: Ask Nemard about BLADE.

rows.label: tev041401_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Nemard about recent developments.

rows.label: tev041401_SEL3031
rows.name: Ask Nemard what he will do next.

rows.label: tev041401_SEL4021
rows.name: Ask Nemard about recent developments.

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0007
rows.name: I live in capsule pod Ma-non give me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0008
rows.name:
It is nice. I can set own
temperature. Or have food
delivered with press of button.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0009
rows.name:
But Ma-non pod is small. Only one Bias
can fit. I cannot live with my family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0010
rows.name:
In my old life, whole family slept
in large tent. Me. Little sister.
Big sister. Many other kin as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0011
rows.name:
Sometimes I am lonely sleeping
alone. Sometimes I want to cry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ugh! Grandfather Auld has
one-track mind. All he talks
about is marriage and family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0002
rows.name: He should worry about his own problems.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Do Earth aliens also get
pestered by family? Does family
insist you find worthy mate?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0004
rows.name:
Bias consider it mission to start families
early. Then children learn to be warriors.
Eventually become leaders of own clans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0005
rows.name:
Unmarried Bias of my age is frowned
upon. Relatives say unpleasant things
behind back. ...Or sometimes to face.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0006
rows.name:
So wearisome! I do have eyes on mate at
moment. But I cannot rush into anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG1001
rows.name: I decided to join BLADE![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG1002
rows.name:
You cannot keep whole city safe
by yourself. It is not right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG1003
rows.name:
But when I asked, BLADE man said I needed to train.
Also that I had to learn "front ear nav." What is
this "front ear nav"? And what is "studying"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG1004
rows.name:
Can I not simply offer
grex meat as tribute?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG1005
rows.name:
Yes! I should try this! I will
bring great helpings of grex
meat right to BLADE Tower![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0101
rows.name:
Thank you for making
my wedding possible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0102
rows.name:
Me and Heptana have been
hunting across Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0103
rows.name:
Other day, we were chased by massive
grex. But we tricked beast. Sent
it tumbling into ravine. Ha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0104
rows.name:
I could not have done so
without brave Heptana.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0105
rows.name:
She makes me want to be better hunter.
She makes me want to protect clan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0201
rows.name:
Enneana knitted us
matching sleep-clothes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0202
rows.name:
She has me wearing sleep-clothes
every night. ...I think I like it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0203
rows.name:
Only problem is Enneana's
beauty. I cannot sleep next
to her! I can only stare...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0204
rows.name:
See bags under eyes? They
are bags of happiness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0205
rows.name:
Enneana inspires me to
become mighty Bias![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0206
rows.name:
Soon I will be strong enough to
vanquish entire gang of Growth![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG3001
rows.name:
Your fight with Growth is almost
done. But I will not sit by![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG3002
rows.name:
I hurl fresh grex carcass at BLADE Tower
daily. It is tribute so I can join you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG3003
rows.name:
But Earth aliens at BLADE
Tower seem angry...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG3004
rows.name:
Is tribute of meat not
considered sign of readiness?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG3005
rows.name:
...What? I must learn how to use "front
ear nav"? Is that kind of hunting spear?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0301
rows.name: Grandfather Auld once gave me wisdom...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0302
rows.name:
He said greatest pride was
not killing beast. Nor was
it victory over Cavern Clan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0303
rows.name:
He said greatest pride was building fine
family. I also appreciate my family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0304
rows.name:
Little sister, Liana, needs to learn
respect. But still she cared for
Grandfather more than anyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0305
rows.name:
Big sister, Duna, still tries to
mother me. Even though I am married.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0306
rows.name:
And mate Heptana is always by my
side. My family is larger than ever![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0307
rows.name:
Now I see how important
Grandfather's words are.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0308
rows.name: Family is bastion of strength for all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG0406
rows.name:
And mate Enneana is always by my
side. My family is larger than ever![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG3010
rows.name:
I hurl many grex carcasses at
BLADE Tower as sign of tribute.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG3011
rows.name:
I want them to make me BLADE so
I can protect city and family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG3012
rows.name:
Finally, muscular BLADE came over
to me. Said he "liked my moxie."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG3013
rows.name:
Then muscleman agreed
to make me trainee![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041401_MSG3014
rows.name:
When I complete training, I
will be true BLADE. Then we
will defend city together![ST:wait ]
